channel_audit.description: Detected. IVR system active, estimated 4-level deep menu.
Not detected. 87% of UAE banking customers prefer WhatsApp for quick inquiries.
No chat widget found on main site or mobile app landing page.
Generic info@ address only. No dedicated support channel found.
No dedicated support handles. DMs closed on Instagram.
No Arabic conversational AI detected on any channel.
Not found. Competitors FAB and ADIB offer callback within IVR.

findings.title: No WhatsApp or Chat Channel Available
findings.narrative: 87% of UAE banking customers under 40 prefer messaging for routine inquiries. Your competitors Emirates NBD and FAB both offer WhatsApp banking. Estimated 15-20% of inbound calls could be deflected to async messaging, reducing AHT by ~25% on those interactions.

findings.title: Arabic Conversational AI: Zero Capability Detected
findings.narrative: No Arabic chatbot, no Arabic IVR NLU, no Arabic self-service detected. In a market where 60%+ of customer interactions are in Arabic (Gulf dialect), this forces all Arabic-speaking customers into agent-handled calls. Competitors ADIB and Emirates NBD have Arabic chatbots processing ~30% of routine queries.

findings.title: Review Response Time: 8-14 Days Average
findings.narrative: Industry best practice is under 24 hours. Negative reviews mentioning "wait times" and "IVR frustration" account for 55% of 1-star reviews. 53% of reviews receive no response at all. This signals a disconnected QA-to-reputation feedback loop.

findings.title: IVR Depth: 4+ Levels Detected
findings.narrative: Automated call testing detected a minimum 4-level IVR menu before reaching an agent. Best-in-class UAE banks use NLU-driven IVR with 1-2 levels maximum. Deep IVR trees correlate with 30-40% higher abandonment rates in MENA banking.

findings.title: Strong Technology Foundation Under-Utilized
findings.narrative: Genesys Cloud platform detected with modern API capabilities. Current utilization appears limited to voice routing. Platform supports AI-powered routing, agent assist, and analytics modules that are not activated. Estimated 40-60% of platform value is dormant.

opportunities.title: WhatsApp Business Channel Launch
opportunities.description: Deploy WhatsApp Business API with automated FAQ handling. Deflect 15-20% of voice calls. No infrastructure change required.

opportunities.title: Review Response Automation
opportunities.description: AI-drafted review responses with human approval. Reduce response time from 8-14 days to under 4 hours.

opportunities.title: Arabic Conversational AI
opportunities.description: Gulf-dialect chatbot handling balance inquiries, card blocks, branch lookup, and complaint logging. Estimated 30% containment rate.

opportunities.title: IVR Modernization with NLU
opportunities.description: Replace 4-level tree with intent-based routing. Leverage existing Genesys Cloud capabilities. Reduce abandonment 30-40%.

opportunities.title: AI QA Scoring (100% Coverage)
opportunities.description: Move from 2% manual QA sampling to 100% AI-scored interactions. Real-time feedback loop to agent training.

opportunities.title: AI Training Simulator Deployment
opportunities.description: Arabic-native agent training AI. Reduce onboarding from 6 weeks to 3 weeks. Continuous skills development linked to QA data.
